main.subject: a monolithic slab of polished black obsidian with sharp fractured edges and faint internal red glow seams

background.ground: a small misty volcanic island of black basalt and cracked lava fields

sky.description: blue-hour overcast just after sunset, cool desaturated light, low mist, faint emerging stars

interaction.mood: heavy, deliberate reveal — the monolith looms then is circled

camera.direction: low vertical hero shot that rises and arcs to the left as you scroll

main_image.prompt: a single monolithic slab of polished black obsidian, sharp fractured glassy edges, subtle internal crimson glow along the fracture seams, volcanic glass, standing vertical, dramatic rim light, seamless neutral mid-grey studio background, centered, photorealistic, ultra detailed, octane render
main_image.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text, people, busy background, multiple objects, extra limbs, cartoon

background_image.prompt: aerial three-quarter view of a small misty volcanic island, black basalt rock, cracked lava fields with faint glowing orange fissures, dark volcanic sand shoreline, low drifting fog, muted blue-hour light, photorealistic terrain, high detail
background_image.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text, buildings, people, bright daylight, cartoon

notes: Blue hour, not night: timeOfDay 0.83 with a cool desaturated palette and a dim warm sun just under the horizon for an ember rim. No aurora (volcanic, not polar); faint stars emerge and clouds sit as low overcast. Heavy mist via high fog density tinted to the cool horizon. Lighting echoes the hour — cool 9000K key agreeing with the sun direction, a 3200K ember rim for the lava glow, a soft cool fill. Restrained bloom and a strong vignette keep it premium and moody. Camera rises from a low vertical framing and arcs left over the scroll to let the 3.5m monolith loom.
